packages.name: Elora Queen's Bridal Package
packages.description: The ultimate 3-step luxury preparative beauty package for brides. Includes Oxygen Glow Facial, Full Glam Engagement Makeup, and a luxurious Gel Manicure set.

packages.name: Weekend Sanctuary Pamper Package
packages.description: Rejuvenating head-to-toe bundle. Enjoy our Ladies' Haircut with blow-dry finish, a premium Gel Manicure, and a soothing Classic Facial.

offers.title: This Friday Only: 20% Off All Makeup Services
offers.description: Take absolute advantage of our limited-time professional makeup promotion! Book any Friday makeup slot and receive LKR 2,500 off.

offers.title: Weekdays Early Bird - LKR 1,500 Off
offers.description: LKR 1,500 off on any service worth LKR 7,500 or more when booked between 9:00 AM and 12:00 PM on Mon to Thu.

artists.name: Samantha Perera
artists.bio: Samantha has over 10 years of experience in luxury hair styling and corrective balayage. She trained in London and excels in custom cuts for both local and expat clients.

artists.name: Priyanthi Silva
artists.bio: Priyanthi is certified in Russian manicure techniques and is the go-to nail artist in Colombo. She crafts gorgeous nail extensions and designs customized for weddings.

artists.name: Elora Jayawardena
artists.bio: Founder of Elora Beauty and a celebrity makeup artist in Sri Lanka. Elora specializes in traditional Kandyan and modern western bridal looks that look flawless on camera.

testimonials.comment: Elora did my makeup for my wedding, and I felt like a queen! The traditional Kandyan styling was flawless and stayed intact the whole night. Highly recommend the Kollupitiya branch!
Highly professional hair stylists. Samantha gave me the best haircut of my life. Elegant interiors, exceptional hospitality, and high product quality.
Excellent gel nails and beautiful aesthetic. Priyanthi's cuticle work is incredibly neat. Absolutely loved the lavender sugar scrub!

faqs.question: Do you accept walk-in clients?
faqs.answer: We highly recommend booking an appointment online to avoid waiting. Walk-ins are accommodated based on artist availability, but scheduled appointments take full priority.

faqs.question: How do I cancel or reschedule my booking?
faqs.answer: No accounts needed! Simply head over to the 'Manage Booking' page on our website, enter your phone number, review your pending slots, enter the 4-digit PIN you received upon booking, and easily reschedule or cancel yourself up to 2 hours before.

faqs.question: Which brands do you use for makeup and skin treatments?
faqs.answer: We prioritize safety and durability. For makeup, we use premium brands like MAC, NARS, and Fenty Beauty. For skincare facials, we utilize certified luxury organic botanical formulations.

faqs.question: Is parking available at your locations?
faqs.answer: Yes, both our Kollupitiya and Cinnamon Gardens branches feature secure, gate-guarded customer parking spaces free of charge.

contactMessages.name: Kasun Jayasuriya
contactMessages.message: Interested in booking a corporate event grooming session for 12 people. Do you offer bulk discounts?

siteSettings.heroDescription: Tailored beauty treatments delivered by experienced artists at our Colombo-area studios.
siteSettings.aboutDescription: Elora Beauty brings professional hair, makeup, nails, skin, spa, and bridal care together across six convenient studios. Our artists combine careful consultation, modern techniques, and warm hospitality so every appointment feels personal from the first conversation to the finished look.
siteSettings.seoTitle: Elora Beauty | Colombo Premium Multi-Branch Beauty Parlour
siteSettings.seoDescription: Professional hair, nails, makeup, skin care, spa, and bridal styling across six Elora Beauty studios.
